title: cornus stolonifera f. interior
intro: Cornus stolonifera f. interior, also known as the red-osier dogwood, is a deciduous shrub native to North America, characterized by its distinctive red stems and clusters of small white or pink flowers. The medicinal properties of Cornus stolonifera f. interior include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant protection against cell damage. The herbal preparations of Cornus stolonifera f. interior include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support heart health and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress.
